description: Run a workspace agent on a given task. Streams output to stdout and writes a structured run record to ~/.dcyfr/runs/.

flags.description: Task intent string (what you want the agent to accomplish)
JSON object of inputs to pass to the agent
Disable streaming output; print final result only

examples: dcyfr agent run documentation-expert --intent 'Generate API reference for ./src/auth'
dcyfr agent run security-engineer --intent 'Audit for OWASP Top 10' --input '{"path":"./src"}'
dcyfr agent run test-engineer --intent 'Add unit tests for PaymentService' --timeout 120000

description: List all available workspace agents with their categories, TLP clearance, and reputation scores.
Create and execute a typed delegation contract. Validates inputs against the agent's manifest schema before dispatch.

flags.description: Fallback behavior on failure: abort | return-partial | retry (default: abort)
Validate the delegation contract without executing

examples: dcyfr delegate --to worktree-coordinator --intent 'Set up isolation for 3 parallel changes' --fallback return-partial
dcyfr delegate --to security-engineer --intent 'Scan for secrets in git history' --dry-run

description: Show recent agent run records from ~/.dcyfr/runs/. Displays status, agent, duration, and token usage.

flags.description: Delete runs older than N days and exit

description: Run a workspace health check. Verifies Intelligence Gateway connectivity, agent availability, npm dependency freshness, and TLP policy file presence.

flags.description: Attempt to auto-fix warning-level issues (e.g. reinstall missing packages)

description: Create a new OpenSpec change directory with all required artifact stubs (proposal.md, design.md, tasks.md, specs/).

flags.description: TLP classification for all artifacts (default: AMBER)
